---
title: "Jed's Website"
image: profile-pic.jpg
about: 
  template: broadside
  image-width: 120cm
  image-shape: round
---

Hello, and welcome to my website!

I am a Ph. D. Student in the Department of Statistics, at the University of California, Davis.
Prior to my time at Davis, I completed my Bachelors degree in statistics, at the California State University, East Bay. During my time at CSUEB, I was a research assistant under Prof. Eric Suess.
